result.stdout:
EasyAF 3.0 CLI Tools.
By CloudNimble. https://nimbleapps.cloud

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  cleanup       Clean up build artifacts (bin, obj, TestResults directories) and
                packages.lock.json files
  code          EasyAF C# code generation commands.
  database      EasyAF database scaffolding commands.
  edmx          EasyAF EDMX commands.
  init          Initialize EasyAF project configuration
  setup         Set up local development environment for existing EasyAF project

Run 'CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Clean up build artifacts (bin, obj, TestResults directories) and packages.lock.json files

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools cleanup [options]

Options:
  -p|--path     Root directory to clean (defaults to current directory)
                Default value is:
                /tmp/inspectra-help-easyaf-4.0.2-ci-20260303-151859-55f0846d5ba24bf1a63fb6c839912de2.
  --dry-run     Show what would be deleted without actually deleting anything
  -q|--quiet    Quiet mode - only show summary
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

commands.payload:

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools code [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  generate      Run code generation for a given EasyAF component.

result.stdout:
Run code generation for a given EasyAF component.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools code generate [options] <Component>

Arguments:
  Component           The component to generate. Available options: business,
                      core, data, api, simplemessagebus, all

Options:
  -p|--path <path>    Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to
                      current directory.
  -dontdelete <path>  A directory that will be ignored when deleting files.
  -notpublic <path>   A comma-separated list of table names to ignore when
                      generating the public API surface.
  -?|-h|--help        Show help information.

commands.payload:
Run code generation for a given EasyAF component.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools code generate [options] <Component>

Arguments:
  Component           The component to generate. Available options: business,
                      core, data, api, simplemessagebus, all

Options:
  -p|--path <path>    Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to
                      current directory.
  -dontdelete <path>  A directory that will be ignored when deleting files.
  -notpublic <path>   A comma-separated list of table names to ignore when
                      generating the public API surface.
  -?|-h|--help        Show help information.

result.stdout:
EasyAF database scaffolding commands.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools database [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  generate      Generate EDMX files from database using existing configuration.
                If no context name is specified, processes all .edmx.config
                files found.
  refresh       Refresh existing EDMX files from the database. If no context
                name is specified, processes all .edmx files found.

Run 'database [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
EasyAF database scaffolding commands.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools database [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  generate      Generate EDMX files from database using existing configuration.
                If no context name is specified, processes all .edmx.config
                files found.
  refresh       Refresh existing EDMX files from the database. If no context
                name is specified, processes all .edmx files found.

Run 'database [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Generate EDMX files from database using existing configuration. If no context name is specified, processes all .edmx.config files found.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools database generate [options]

Options:
  -x|--context-name     DbContext class name (used to locate
                        {ContextName}.edmx.config file). If not specified, all
                        .edmx.config files will be processed.
  -p|--project          Path to the project directory (defaults to auto-detected
                        .Data folder)
  -s|--solution-folder  Solution directory (defaults to current directory)
                        Default value is:
                        /tmp/inspectra-help-easyaf-4.0.2-ci-20260303-151859-55f0846d5ba24bf1a63fb6c839912de2.
  -?|-h|--help          Show help information.

Refresh existing EDMX files from the database. If no context name is specified, processes all .edmx files found.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools database refresh [options]

  -x|--context-name     DbContext class name (used to locate {ContextName}.edmx
                        and {ContextName}.edmx.config files). If not specified,
                        all .edmx files will be processed.
  -p|--project          Path to the project directory (defaults to auto-detected
                        .Data folder)
  -s|--solution-folder  Solution directory (defaults to current directory)
                        Default value is:
                        /tmp/inspectra-help-easyaf-4.0.2-ci-20260303-151859-55f0846d5ba24bf1a63fb6c839912de2.

result.stdout:
EasyAF EDMX commands.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools edmx [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  generate      Generate an EDMX file from an EF Core DbContext in the Data
                project.
  swap          Switch the Provider in the EDMX file between the
                System.Data.SqlClient & Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.
  watch         Watch EDMX files in your Data project for changes and regenerate
                the Framework.

Run 'edmx [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
EasyAF EDMX commands.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools edmx [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  generate      Generate an EDMX file from an EF Core DbContext in the Data
                project.
  swap          Switch the Provider in the EDMX file between the
                System.Data.SqlClient & Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.
  watch         Watch EDMX files in your Data project for changes and regenerate
                the Framework.

Run 'edmx [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Generate an EDMX file from an EF Core DbContext in the Data project.

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools edmx generate [options]

Options:
  -path <path>              Working directory for the code compiler. Defaults to
                            current directory.
  --context <DbContext>     The DbContext class to use.
  --environment <ENV>       The environment to use (Development, Production,
                            etc).
  --project <PATH>          The project folder containing the DbContext.
  --startup-project <PATH>  The startup project folder.
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.

result.stdout:
Initialize EasyAF project configuration

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools init [options]

Options:
  -c|--connection-string      Connection string source (e.g.,
                              'appsettings.json:ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection')
                              or actual connection string
  -x|--context-name           DbContext class name
  --dbcontext-namespace       Namespace for generated DbContext (defaults to
                              .Data project namespace)
  -e|--exclude-tables         Tables to exclude from scaffolding
  --no-data-annotations       Use fluent API instead of data annotations
  --no-pluralizer             Disable pluralization of entity names
  --objects-namespace         Namespace for generated entity objects (defaults
                              to .Core project namespace)
  -p|--provider               Database provider (SqlServer or PostgreSQL)
                              Allowed values are: SqlServer, PostgreSQL.
  -s|--solution-folder        Solution directory (defaults to current directory)
                              Default value is:
                              /tmp/inspectra-help-easyaf-4.0.2-ci-20260303-151859-55f0846d5ba24bf1a63fb6c839912de2.
  -t|--tables                 Specific tables to include (if not specified, all
                              tables will be included)
  --simplemessagebus-project  Optional SimpleMessageBus project name to create
                              (e.g., 'MyApp.EventBus' or
                              'MyApp.SimpleMessageBus')
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information.

commands.payload:
Initialize EasyAF project configuration

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools init [options]

Options:
  -c|--connection-string      Connection string source (e.g.,
                              'appsettings.json:ConnectionStrings:DefaultConnection')
                              or actual connection string
  -x|--context-name           DbContext class name
  --dbcontext-namespace       Namespace for generated DbContext (defaults to
                              .Data project namespace)
  -e|--exclude-tables         Tables to exclude from scaffolding
  --no-data-annotations       Use fluent API instead of data annotations
  --no-pluralizer             Disable pluralization of entity names
  --objects-namespace         Namespace for generated entity objects (defaults
                              to .Core project namespace)
  -p|--provider               Database provider (SqlServer or PostgreSQL)
                              Allowed values are: SqlServer, PostgreSQL.
  -s|--solution-folder        Solution directory (defaults to current directory)
                              Default value is:
                              /tmp/inspectra-help-easyaf-4.0.2-ci-20260303-151859-55f0846d5ba24bf1a63fb6c839912de2.
  -t|--tables                 Specific tables to include (if not specified, all
                              tables will be included)
  --simplemessagebus-project  Optional SimpleMessageBus project name to create
                              (e.g., 'MyApp.EventBus' or
                              'MyApp.SimpleMessageBus')
  -?|-h|--help                Show help information.

result.stdout:
Set up local development environment for existing EasyAF project

Usage: CloudNimble.EasyAF.Tools setup [options]

Options:
  -c|--connection-string  Local connection string to store in user secrets
  -x|--context-name       DbContext class name (if multiple contexts exist)
  --dry-run               Show what would be configured without making changes
  -s|--solution-folder    Solution directory (defaults to current directory)
                          Default value is:
                          /tmp/inspectra-help-easyaf-4.0.2-ci-20260303-151859-55f0846d5ba24bf1a63fb6c839912de2.
  -?|-h|--help            Show help information.
